title: Month-End Close: Generate Financial Statements
description: Produce a complete P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow statement from your adjusted trial balance using Claude.

steps.title: Create a 'Financial Statements' skill
steps.content: This skill takes the adjusted trial balance (after your approved AJEs are posted) and produces three statements: income statement, balance sheet, and statement of cash flows. Provide your preferred format and groupings.

steps.title: Include formula-based tie-outs on the cover sheet
steps.content: The output must include a cover sheet where net income on the P&L ties to retained earnings on the BS, and the cash flow statement ending balance ties to cash on the BS. All by formula, not hardcoded.

steps.title: Output as Excel workpaper
steps.content: Request the output as a formatted Excel file with tabs for each statement plus the cover sheet. This becomes part of your workpaper package.
